PRIMARY_VERDICT: A1 batch-clean does NOT FULLY replicate at 7B: 3B was flat 100->100; 7B shows a small cross-entity leak (100->91.7%). Scopes 'batch eliminates corruption' to 3B/N<=100.
SECONDARY_size_density: 7B batch 91.7% vs 3B batch 100% -> larger model slightly LESS clean (opposite of 'small collapses faster'). DIRECTIONAL ONLY: n=12 (1 probe), single seed, band [4-8] is relatively DEEPER in 7B(28L) than 3B(36L) -> confounded. NOT a size law (D1's job).
caveats: CPU linear-algebra (compute_P SVD + solve moved off GPU for VRAM)
